mapper.select: SELECT eva_id, user_id, user_name, score, content, eva_img, eva_time, room_name, order_id, reply FROM t_evaluate WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY eva_time DESC
SELECT eva_id, user_id, user_name, score, content, eva_img, eva_time, room_name, order_id, reply FROM t_evaluate ORDER BY eva_time DESC
